notes: Iter 2 RUNNING (PID=14720). Turn 7 at Jan 2022 calendar nav — agent manually clicking Next Year. Root causes identified and FIXED for iter-3: (1) _select_via_combobox now presses Escape before clicking trigger to close any open overlay; (2) task_iter4.txt: work arrangement value fixed to 'Hybrid' (agent passed hint text); (3) ONE-DROPDOWN-AT-A-TIME warning added. These changes are committed to branch (not yet PR). Agent passed 'I already live in the Dallas, TX area' correctly. Spinbutton guard active. Calendar nav expected to complete ~40 more min; then work arrangement, then page 3+. Iter-2 expected score 50-80 depending on page advance. Side task: job_app_benchmark identifier randomization complete (data-field/data-name suffixed with per-visit hex token, commit 4ac627d on main). See issue #142.

ground_truth.tool_schema_format: bare {name,description,parameters} for hand-crafted <tools>; ENVELOPED {type:function,function:{...}} for Ollama native tools: API field
ground_truth.tool_result_role: role:tool works via Ollama native API (Ollama handles it internally)
ground_truth.vibethinker_model: WeiboAI/VibeThinker-1.5B; as an ADVISOR it has NO page snapshot so it hallucinates refs -> DISABLED
ground_truth.qwen3_behavior: qwen3:4b on Ollama returns STRUCTURED message.tool_calls (qwen2.5-coder returned null+text). Thinking routes to message.thinking; content is clean. HermesCodec is zero-changes compatible.
ground_truth.form_widgets: job form: 12 custom <button role=combobox> dropdowns (use select_option, NOT fill); a custom calendar DatePicker (navigate year/month then click ISO-labeled day cell); MultiSelect skills; NumberStepper (spinbutton, click +N times); Checkbox certify; SignaturePad; FileUpload; ~26 fields across 8 pages
ground_truth.advisor_decision: DISABLED. Run command must NOT pass --advisor.
ground_truth.context_window: num_ctx=32768 required (OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION=1 makes it safe at ~4500 MiB). 16384 gives only 7168 token input budget — too small for 8-page form. Restore to 32768.
ground_truth.scoring_system: GET http://localhost:3000/api/score/session-end at end of each run. Writes .vibe/last_benchmark_score.json with commitMessageStart.
ground_truth.loop_issue: Full loop architecture documented in GitHub issue #142 on VibeHarness repo.
ground_truth.iter3_fixes: Escape in _select_via_combobox; work arrangement='Hybrid'; ONE-DROPDOWN-AT-A-TIME warning; calendar select_option is atomic in tool (no manual nav needed)
